meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't deploy apps (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't deploy apps. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve Deployment Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with deployment. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship production-ready apps faster. Intermediate-level case study.
content.answer_block: Deployment friction kills momentum. The Antigravity project template standardizes your CI/CD pipelines, environment configurations, and infrastructure-as-code. By pairing this with Claude Code, you automate the entire deployment lifecycle, ensuring every project you ship is production-ready, stable, and scalable without manual intervention or configuration headaches.
content.intro:
You have spent weeks crafting the perfect UI, refining the backend logic, and squashing edge-case bugs. The client is waiting, the demo is ready, but the terminal is screaming 'Deployment Failed' for the tenth time. This is the silent killer of freelance careers—the gap between a working local build and a live, scalable production environment.

It is time to stop fighting infrastructure. By leveraging the Antigravity project template, you transform your deployment process from a manual, error-prone chore into a repeatable, automated system. We are going to bypass the configuration nightmare and get your code from your machine to the cloud in minutes, not days.

steps.title: Bootstrap with Antigravity
steps.description: Initialize your project using the Antigravity CLI to ensure your directory structure is pre-configured for modern deployment standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the 'full-stack-prod' template. Include pre-configured Dockerfiles, GitHub Actions for CI/CD, and environment variable validation.

steps.title: Configure Infrastructure-as-Code
steps.description: Define your infrastructure requirements within the template to ensure consistent environment parity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Terraform files for an AWS ECS Fargate deployment, ensuring all security groups and networking are set for a production environment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate terraform modules for ECS deployment'

steps.title: Automate Environment Secrets
steps.description: Use Claude Code to securely map your local environment variables to your deployment secrets manager.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a script that validates required environment variables and maps them to AWS Secrets Manager keys within the deployment pipeline.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create secret-mapping script for CI/CD pipeline'

steps.title: Implement Automated CI/CD Pipelines
steps.description: Integrate GitHub Actions to trigger automated tests and deployments on every push to the main branch.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting, unit tests, and builds a Docker image before pushing to ECR.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup github actions workflow for build and push'

steps.title: Verify Deployment Integrity
steps.description: Perform a dry-run deployment to ensure all configurations are correctly linked and operational.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a health-check script that verifies the deployment status and returns a success signal if the application is reachable.

pro_tips: Always use a 'staging' environment variable prefix to prevent accidental production database writes.
Implement 'Infrastructure-as-Code' drift detection to alert you when your manual cloud changes diverge from your template.
Use Claude Code to generate custom 'pre-commit' hooks that prevent sensitive credentials from ever hitting your repository.
Standardize your logging format early in the Antigravity template to ensure observability is built-in, not bolted on.
Cache your Docker layers in GitHub Actions to reduce build times by up to 70% for repeat deployments.
content.next_steps: After completing this deployment, audit your past projects. Apply the Antigravity template to your most profitable client app to reduce your maintenance overhead immediately.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting billable hours on deployment debugging. Build faster, ship cleaner, and scale your freelance revenue with our proven AI-driven workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
